## takumi affected

List packages affected by recent changes

### Synopsis

Determine which packages have been affected by file changes since a given
git ref. Includes downstream dependents.

```
takumi affected [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help           help for affected
      --since string   Git ref to compare against (e.g., main, HEAD~3)
```
